heading: VESSEL IDENTIFICATION SYSTEM
label: 125 VESSEL IDENTIFICATION SYSTEM
notes: Historical and Revision NotesSection 101 of H.R. 3105, as amended, adds a new chapter 125 to title 46, United States Code, to establish a vessel identification system for all vessels of the United States. This would include vessels documented under chapter 121 of title 46, numbered under chapter 123 of that title, or titled under the law of a State. This new chapter consists of new sections 12501–12507 as follows.

children.heading: Establishment of a vessel identification system
Identification numbers, signal letters, and markings
